releaseNotes: v0.29.0 — zone-list multi-device sync. Adding, renaming, re-ordering, re-typing, or deleting a zone on one device now syncs to your other devices within a sync cycle (~30 seconds). This was the last piece of RxRescue that wasn't multi-device-aware. Pre-release code audit by three independent reviewers caught and fixed 2 release-blockers and 5 smaller issues before this build. Heads-up on first sync after upgrade: if you already had zones on both devices, each device's defaults (Z1, Z2, Pharmacy, Cabinet, Fridge) had different internal IDs that couldn't sync — you may see defaults doubled up (one 'Z1' and one 'Z1 (xxxxxxxx)') the first time the new sync runs. Pick one device as master, clean-reset zones on the other; secondary will re-sync master's list fresh. Known limitation: simultaneous rename-on-one-device + delete-on-other-device of the same zone can leave the two devices disagreeing; sequential edits are fine. A v0.29.1 follow-up will close that race. 586 tests passing.
